headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk over medium term if ESG lag persists — JSW Steel's $2B decarbonization plan signals sector shift, with indirect ESG pressure on JSW Energy
what_matters: Possible P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG ratings decline due to weak climate disclosure.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD, ESRS frameworks triggered; SEBI scrutiny risk if disclosure lags.
Potential for higher cost of capital (+20-40bps) if JSW Energy is perceived as lagging on climate action.
